scope: Promote X9 IntegratedOsctlTraceReplay stable osctl extraction closure into the Phase 9 experiment matrix

Validate osctl experiment report JSON, integrated osctl trace replay ViewV1 JSON, and graph history JSON evidence
Keep M11 as host-validation osctl extraction work-unit evidence, not calibrated wall-clock extraction timing

implemented_contract_clauses.clause: experiment evidence references integrated-osctl-trace-replay:26901@1 by exact kind/id/generation
osctl graph history extraction preserves X0-X8 integrated scenarios through historical exact-generation edges
osctl exposes stable integrated-osctl-trace-replay, graph history, and experiment report JSON views without mutating semantic state

findings_fixed: M11 does not create a parallel osctl truth source; it references existing X9 IntegratedOsctlTraceReplay evidence

No calibrated wall-clock osctl extraction timing is claimed
No Rust runtime, validator, osctl mutation, adapter, or substrate path changed for M11
bad_smells_checked: No CLI output string is treated as semantic truth
No adapter internal state appears in the experiment schema
No substrate mapping is treated as semantic truth
No third-party crate internal state is used as an osctl evidence source
residual_notes: A future timed osctl extraction benchmark can add a dedicated typed benchmark object while preserving this workload evidence
M11 closes the current Phase 9 experiment matrix evidence set

residual_gaps: M11 is host-validation osctl extraction work-unit evidence, not calibrated wall-clock extraction timing
